title: galeopsis × cousturieri
intro: Galeopsis × cousturieri, a rare and hybrid plant species, is a cross between the Tall Hemp-nettle (Galeopsis altissima) and the Siffleur (Galeopsis tetrahit). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galeopsis × cousturieri are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves in tincture form.
